explanations.7: The ${KARAKEEP_VERSION:-release} syntax means use the KARAKEEP_VERSION environment variable if it exists, otherwise default to the string 'release'.
explanations.15: The ${UID:-1000}:${GID:-1000} syntax sets the container to run as a specific user and group; it defaults to user 1000 and group 1000 if those environment variables aren't set.
explanations.40: This creates a named volume called 'meilisearch' that persists data even when the container stops, rather than storing it in a temporary location.
